'''鈭歠-b-s''' ('''kafabas''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:polemicize|polemicize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-b-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:polemicize|polemicize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-b-s
|-
! Lemma
| kafabas
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifabas|thifabas]] || [[word:jifabas|jifabas]] || [[word:shifabas|shifabas]] || [[word:kifabas|kifabas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufabas|thuthufabas]] || [[word:jujufabas|jujufabas]] || [[word:shushufabas|shushufabas]] || [[word:kukufabas|kukufabas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufabas|thufabas]] || [[word:jufabas|jufabas]] || [[word:shufabas|shufabas]] || [[word:kufabas|kufabas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufabas|thufabas]] || [[word:jufabas|jufabas]] || [[word:shufabas|shufabas]] || [[word:kufabas|kufabas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefabas|thefabas]] || [[word:jefabas|jefabas]] || [[word:shefabas|shefabas]] || [[word:kefabas|kefabas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofabas|thothofabas]] || [[word:jojofabas|jojofabas]] || [[word:shoshofabas|shoshofabas]] || [[word:kokofabas|kokofabas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofabas|thofabas]] || [[word:jofabas|jofabas]] || [[word:shofabas|shofabas]] || [[word:kofabas|kofabas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofabas|thofabas]] || [[word:jofabas|jofabas]] || [[word:shofabas|shofabas]] || [[word:kofabas|kofabas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fabas|fabas]] || [[word:fabas|fabas]] || [[word:fabas|fabas]] || [[word:fabas|fabas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fabas|fabas]] || [[word:fabas|fabas]] || [[word:fabas|fabas]] || [[word:fabas|fabas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fabas|fabas]] || [[word:fabas|fabas]] || [[word:fabas|fabas]] || [[word:fabas|fabas]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fabas|fabas]] || [[word:fabas|fabas]] || [[word:fabas|fabas]] || [[word:fabas|fabas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙fabas|th忙fabas]] || [[word:j忙fabas|j忙fabas]] || [[word:sh忙fabas|sh忙fabas]] || [[word:k忙fabas|k忙fabas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafabas|thathafabas]] || [[word:jajafabas|jajafabas]] || [[word:shashafabas|shashafabas]] || [[word:kakafabas|kakafabas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafabas|thafabas]] || [[word:jafabas|jafabas]] || [[word:shafabas|shafabas]] || [[word:kafabas|kafabas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafabas|thafabas]] || [[word:jafabas|jafabas]] || [[word:shafabas|shafabas]] || [[word:kafabas|kafabas]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shafabas|shafabas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshafabas|goshafabas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishafabas|gokishafabas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shafabasn眉|shafabasn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshafabasnkn眉|goshafabasnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishafabasn眉|gokishafabasn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafabassh毛|shafabassh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafabasnksh毛|goshafabasnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafabassh毛|gokishafabassh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafabasro|shafabasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafabasnkro|goshafabasnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafabasro|gokishafabasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shafabasmu|shafabasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafabasnkmu|goshafabasnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafabasmu|gokishafabasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shafabassher|shafabassher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshafabasnksher|goshafabasnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishafabassher|gokishafabassher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shafabasng|shafabasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshafabasnkng|goshafabasnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishafabasng|gokishafabasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shafabasya|shafabasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshafabasnkya|goshafabasnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishafabasya|gokishafabasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shafabasyam|shafabasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshafabasnkyam|goshafabasnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishafabasyam|gokishafabasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafabasn眉sh毛|shafabasn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafabasnkn眉sh毛|goshafabasnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafabasn眉sh毛|gokishafabasn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafabasn眉ro|shafabasn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafabasnkn眉ro|goshafabasnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafabasn眉ro|gokishafabasn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafabasn眉mu|shafabasn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafabasnkn眉mu|goshafabasnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafabasn眉mu|gokishafabasn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafabassh毛n眉|shafabassh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafabasnksh毛n眉|goshafabasnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafabassh毛n眉|gokishafabassh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafabassh毛ro|shafabassh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafabasnksh毛ro|goshafabasnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafabassh毛ro|gokishafabassh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafabassh毛mu|shafabassh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafabasnksh毛mu|goshafabasnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafabassh毛mu|gokishafabassh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafabasron眉|shafabasron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafabasnkron眉|goshafabasnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafabasron眉|gokishafabasron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafabasrosh毛|shafabasrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafabasnkrosh毛|goshafabasnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafabasrosh毛|gokishafabasrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafabasromu|shafabasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafabasnkromu|goshafabasnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafabasromu|gokishafabasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafabasmun眉|shafabasmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafabasnkmun眉|goshafabasnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafabasmun眉|gokishafabasmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafabasmush毛|shafabasmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafabasnkmush毛|goshafabasnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafabasmush毛|gokishafabasmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafabasmuro|shafabasmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafabasnkmuro|goshafabasnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafabasmuro|gokishafabasmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
